narration: This is the blood-brain barrier, a selective shield for our most vital organ.
visual_description: Escalation visual: This is the blood-brain barrier, a selective shield for our most vital organ.

narration: It tightly regulates what enters the brain, keeping out toxins while allowing nutrients in.

ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: It tightly regulates what enters the brain, keeping out toxins while allowing nutrients in.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: It tightly regulates what enters the brain, keeping out toxins while allowing nutrients in.

narration: But recent studies suggest it’s not always impenetrable. Some drugs may navigate through!
